name: Aegis Authenticator
description: Zero-knowledge TOTP autofill from your Aegis vault.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://oegkpbuziwipyrmjeqaf.supabase.co https://api.pwnedpasswords.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none';
